--- shfmt drift ---
diff ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_rq_state_migrate_quality.sh.orig ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_rq_state_migrate_quality.sh
--- ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_rq_state_migrate_quality.sh.orig
+++ ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_rq_state_migrate_quality.sh
@@ -261,8 +261,8 @@
     rm -rf "$REAL_STATE_ROOT"
     _state_root_base="$REAL_HOME/.claude/state"
     _p="$(dirname "$REAL_STATE_ROOT")"
-    while [ "$_p" != "$_state_root_base" ] && [ "$_p" != "/" ] \
-      && [ -d "$_p" ] && [ -z "$(ls -A "$_p" 2>/dev/null)" ]; do
+    while [ "$_p" != "$_state_root_base" ] && [ "$_p" != "/" ] &&
+      [ -d "$_p" ] && [ -z "$(ls -A "$_p" 2>/dev/null)" ]; do
       rmdir "$_p" 2>/dev/null || break
       _p="$(dirname "$_p")"
     done
